final:
// // This module decrements the 4-bit binary counter on each positive clock edge when enabled and resets to zero asynchronously when the reset signal is asserted.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input enable,
  output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
      out <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      out <= out + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements the 4-bit binary counter on each positive clock edge when enabled and resets to zero asynchronously when the reset signal is asserted.
